# Vendored runtimes

`rhwp/` contains `@rhwp/core` 0.7.10 files copied from
[`DoHyun468/claw-hwp`](https://github.com/DoHyun468/claw-hwp) commit
`583e327a4e1936d27061ba73086e83e538238a8e`.

The runtime is vendored so HWP conversion does not install Python packages or
clone a mutable Git branch during execution. Its MIT license is preserved in
`rhwp/LICENSE`.
